data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Ensures data transmission security between clients and servers.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Protects the website from common web threats and vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: OWASP Top 10 protection, custom rulesets, real-time monitoring.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Infrastructure in place to detect and mitigate Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Traffic analysis, rate limiting, attack draining.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Routine assessments to identify and resolve potential security issues.
data.technical_spec: Penetration testing, vulnerability scanning, compliance checks.

data.title: User Authentication
data.description: Secure user authentication processes to protect user data.
